_comment_purpose: Example ~/.claude/settings.json wiring for the MultiAgentSystem hooks. All hooks are opt-in and exit silently outside active multiagent runs. Copy or merge into your real settings.json; do not point Claude Code at this example file directly. Remove any hook entry you do not want.
_comment_paths: Adjust the absolute paths to your MultiAgentSystem checkout. Default example assumes D:/Projects/MultiAgentSystem (Windows).
_comment_bash_alternative: For WSL / Git Bash / macOS / Linux, replace each PowerShell `command` value with: bash /path/to/MultiAgentSystem/claude-code/hooks/<hook-name>.sh (subagent-log stays `python .../subagent-log.py` everywhere).
_comment_hooks: SessionStart: inject the project profile. UserPromptSubmit: reinject the PM role every turn while a run is active (keeps the role from fading in long sessions). SubagentStart/SubagentStop: mechanically log worker spawns/finishes to the run folder. Stop: warn about unclosed runs.
